word: G4882 - συναποστέλλω - synapostéllō - soon-ap-os-tel'-lo - Send with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συναποστέλλω

- Transliteration: sunapostello

- Phonetic: soon-ap-os-tel'-lo

- Definition:

1. to send with

- Origin: from G4862 and G649

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G649; to despatch (on an errand) in company with: - send you.
